best_individual: mul(if_then_else(is_water, protected_div(sub(protected_div(0.517, 0.279), neg(0.488)), protected_div(distance, protected_div(distance, steepness))), 0.004), add(steepness, distance))

hall_of_fame.individual: mul(if_then_else(is_water, protected_div(sub(protected_div(0.517, 0.279), neg(0.488)), protected_div(distance, protected_div(distance, steepness))), 0.004), add(steepness, distance))
neg(protected_pow(if_then_else(is_water, steepness, 0.654), add(steepness, if_then_else(is_water, 0.895, if_then_else(is_water, distance, distance)))))
neg(protected_pow(if_then_else(is_water, steepness, 0.654), add(steepness, if_then_else(or_(is_water, is_water), 0.895, if_then_else(is_water, distance, distance)))))
mul(if_then_else(is_water, if_then_else(is_water, distance, distance), 0.053), add(steepness, distance))
